message:
fix(combinator): circuit breaker test clarifies that Open transition clears sliding window, not Close

The test half_open_to_closed_resets_sliding_window was misleadingly
named and structured — it appeared to test a reset on the
HalfOpen→Closed transition, but the actual fix (from the prior
commit) clears the sliding window when the breaker opens.

Renamed to opening_circuit_clears_sliding_window_before_half_open_recovery
and restructured:
- Asserts sliding_window_failure_rate == 0.0 immediately after
  opening, confirming the window was cleared on the Open transition.
- Asserts State::Closed after the single successful probe, verifying
  the half-open recovery path directly.
- Removes the misleading comment about the close transition being
  the reset point.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
